title: cyrtopera seleensis
side_effects: Cyrtopera seleensis can have side effects if used improperly, such as diarrhea, dizziness, and rapid heartbeat. Ingesting large quantities of the plant can lead to stomach cramps, nausea, and vomiting. Overuse of the plant's extracts may also cause fatigue, headaches, and allergic reactions in some individuals. Misuse of Cyrtopera seleensis can exacerbate pre-existing medical conditions, such as high blood pressure, kidney disease, or liver problems.
